title: Vat zone GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of a single vat zone.

vatZoneNumber.description: A unique identifier of the vat zone.

name.description: The name of the vat zone.

enabledForCustomer.description: If this value is true, then the vat zone can be used for a customer.

enabledForSupplier.description: If this value is true, then the vat zone can be used for a supplier.

self.description: A unique link reference to the vat zone item.
